panels.title: 수율 (Yield) 추이 — 1분 집계
panels.description: PASS건수 / 전체건수 × 100. 임계선 98% 아래면 확인 필요.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00', StartTime) AS time, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Item = 'PASS' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS yield FROM inspection_results WHERE StartTime >= datetime('now', '-3 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00', StartTime) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: 평균 처리시간 (Duration) — ms
panels.description: 검사 1건당 소요시간. 급증 시 카메라/조명 이상 의심.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00', StartTime) AS time, ROUND(AVG(Duration), 1) AS avg_ms, MAX(Duration) AS max_ms FROM inspection_results WHERE StartTime >= datetime('now', '-3 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00', StartTime) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: 불량 유형별 건수
panels.description: 현재 Lot 내 불량 원인 분포.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT Item AS error_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM inspection_results WHERE Item != 'PASS' AND StartTime >= datetime('now', '-3 hours') GROUP BY Item ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: 오프셋 드리프트 (XOffset / YOffset)
panels.description: 정렬 오프셋 변화 추이. 한쪽으로 계속 이동하면 Alignment 이상.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00', StartTime) AS time, ROUND(AVG(XOffset),3) AS x_offset, ROUND(AVG(YOffset),3) AS y_offset FROM inspection_results WHERE StartTime >= datetime('now', '-3 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00', StartTime) ORDER BY time ASC
